assistant_contract.name: curador_orden_assistant
assistant_contract.role: assistant to the curator that keeps order, creates dry-run cleanup evidence and teaches workspace hygiene
reads: existing reports and handoffs by path reference
may_write: curator assistant docs when explicitly maintaining the contract
never_does: touch private game or TCG lanes
handoff_contract: INFERENCIA: likely category from path/status only
INCOGNITA: untracked or ambiguous material awaiting ficha

allowed_now: teach operators and agents the order protocol
create fichas or manifests for owned files
forbidden_now: git reset, checkout or broad revert
touch private game, TCG or game bridge lanes

rules.title: Start with status
rules.rule: Run worktree-status or curator-assistant before changing broad folders.

rules.title: No broad staging
rules.rule: Never use git add . in this workspace; stage only files owned by the current task.

rules.title: No physical cleanup during concurrency
rules.rule: When other agents are active, do not delete, move, revert or rename their files.

rules.title: Use evidence folders
rules.rule: Generated outputs go to runtime/outputs, logs to runtime/logs and handoffs to NEXT_SESSION_BRIEF/SESSION_FINGERPRINT.

rules.title: Ficha before archive
rules.rule: Unknown material needs a ficha, hash or manifest before archive/delete candidates are trusted.

rules.title: Keep private lanes blocked
rules.rule: Game, TCG, secrets, paid content and publication actions stay BLOCK unless a specific gate authorizes them.

rules.title: Close with verification
rules.rule: Use claim-contract, project-scan, test-plan and run-safe-tests before claiming a feature is done.

operator_checklist: 1. Read AGENTS.md and the current handoff.
2. Run curator-assistant --json for a dry report.
5. Add evidence before changing task status.
6. Leave a handoff if the work remains open.
anti_clutter_defaults: Prefer docs/intake or runtime/outputs over loose root files.
Prefer manifests and fichas over copying raw source trees.
Prefer REVIEW over cleanup when lineage is unclear.
Prefer small reversible patches over broad reorganizations.

next_safe_actions: Share this report path with agents before broad cleanup work.
Convert high-value unknown files into fichas before any archive or delete decision.
Run project-scan, claim-contract and run-safe-tests before claiming implementation closure.
Keep concurrent tracked changes untouched until their owning agent writes a handoff.

certainty: Generated a dry-run order report from git metadata and project scan metadata.
No files were deleted, moved, staged, committed or reverted.
inference: Unknown or untracked files are treated as active or review-required while other agents are working.
unknown: File contents, exact duplicate hashes and canonical targets were not inspected in this lightweight pass.
